reviews.comment:
Tienen comida para llevar o comer allí, hamburguesas, y platos del día. Buena atención.
Buenos precios

(Translated by Google)
They have takeout and dine-in options, burgers, and daily specials. Good service.
Good prices.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtXzdHbW53RRAB

reviews.comment:
Pasamos a comer.Tuve que pedir que limpien la mesa.Con la comida no me dieron servilletas,tuve que levantarme a buscarlas.El aire apagado.Entre hamburguesa y hamburguesa esperamos 20 minutos.No habia alcohool,poca higiene dentro del local. solamente 3 personas sentadas para comer.El baño bien.Caro para el servicio que ofrece el full.Saquen ustedes sus conclusiones.

(Translated by Google)
We stopped in to eat. I had to ask for the table to be cleared. They didn't give me napkins with my food; I had to get up to get them. The air conditioning was off. We waited 20 minutes between burgers. There was no alcohol, and the place was unclean. Only three people were seated to eat. The bathroom was fine. Expensive for the service offered by the restaurant. Draw your own conclusions.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtcjhIQ3lnRRAB
